# Projects
-------------------------------------------
Project 1: Internship
Purpose: Recreated some code to analyse and model the test results for a school district. First it cleans up the code, removing duplicates, selects columns, and rearanges the data. Then it craetes a pivot table so we can add new measure such as met_performance and met_growth. Then it exports and is used to graphing and the tables. Our plotting code formats and sorts the scatterplot to show the data. It creates 6 plots based on school grade bands and district vs school level. Finaly, the table code pulls our pivot table and creates a table out of it we can display next to our scatterplots.
